tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.addFacetToObject
tools.description: Adds a new Facet to an object. An object can have more than one facet applied on it.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.applySchema
tools.description: Copies the input published schema, at the specified version, into the Directory with the same name and version as that of the published schema.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.attachObject
tools.description:
Attaches an existing object to another object. An object can be accessed in two ways:

  1. Using the path

  2. Using ObjectIdentifier

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.attachPolicy
tools.description: Attaches a policy object to a regular object. An object can have a limited number of attached policies.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.attachToIndex
tools.description: Attaches the specified object to the specified index.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.attachTypedLink
tools.description: Attaches a typed link to a specified source and target object. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.batchRead
tools.description: Performs all the read operations in a batch.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.batchWrite
tools.description: Performs all the write operations in a batch. Either all the operations succeed or none.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.createDirectory
tools.description: Creates a Directory by copying the published schema into the directory. A directory cannot be created without a schema.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.createFacet
tools.description: Creates a new Facet in a schema. Facet creation is allowed only in development or applied schemas.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.createIndex
tools.description: Creates an index object. See Indexing for more information.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.createObject
tools.description: Creates an object in a Directory. Additionally attaches the object to a parent, if a parent reference and LinkName is specified. An object is simply a collection of Facet attributes. You can also use this API call to create a policy object, if the facet from which you create the object is a policy facet.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.createSchema
tools.description:
Creates a new schema in a development state. A schema can exist in three phases:

  • Development: This is a mutable phase of the schema. All new schemas are in the development phase. Once the schema is finalized, it can be published.

  • Published: Published schemas are immutable and have a version associated with them.

  • Applied: Applied schemas are mutable in a way that allows you to add new schema facets. You can also add new, nonrequired attributes to existing schema facets. You can apply only published schemas to directories.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.createTypedLinkFacet
tools.description: Creates a TypedLinkFacet. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.deleteDirectory
tools.description: Deletes a directory. Only disabled directories can be deleted. A deleted directory cannot be undone. Exercise extreme caution when deleting directories.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.deleteFacet
tools.description: Deletes a given Facet. All attributes and Rules that are associated with the facet will be deleted. Only development schema facets are allowed deletion.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.deleteObject
tools.description: Deletes an object and its associated attributes. Only objects with no children and no parents can be deleted.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.deleteSchema
tools.description: Deletes a given schema. Schemas in a development and published state can only be deleted.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.deleteTypedLinkFacet
tools.description: Deletes a TypedLinkFacet. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.detachFromIndex
tools.description: Detaches the specified object from the specified index.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.detachObject
tools.description: Detaches a given object from the parent object. The object that is to be detached from the parent is specified by the link name.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.detachPolicy
tools.description: Detaches a policy from an object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.detachTypedLink
tools.description: Detaches a typed link from a specified source and target object. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.disableDirectory
tools.description: Disables the specified directory. Disabled directories cannot be read or written to. Only enabled directories can be disabled. Disabled directories may be reenabled.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.enableDirectory
tools.description: Enables the specified directory. Only disabled directories can be enabled. Once enabled, the directory can then be read and written to.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getAppliedSchemaVersion
tools.description: Returns current applied schema version ARN, including the minor version in use.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getDirectory
tools.description: Retrieves metadata about a directory.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getFacet
tools.description: Gets details of the Facet, such as facet name, attributes, Rules, or ObjectType. You can call this on all kinds of schema facets -- published, development, or applied.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getLinkAttributes
tools.description: Retrieves attributes that are associated with a typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getObjectAttributes
tools.description: Retrieves attributes within a facet that are associated with an object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getObjectInformation
tools.description: Retrieves metadata about an object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getSchemaAsJson
tools.description: Retrieves a JSON representation of the schema. See JSON Schema Format for more information.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.getTypedLinkFacetInformation
tools.description: Returns the identity attribute order for a specific TypedLinkFacet. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listAppliedSchemaArns
tools.description: Lists schema major versions applied to a directory. If SchemaArn is provided, lists the minor version.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listAttachedIndices
tools.description: Lists indices attached to the specified object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listDevelopmentSchemaArns
tools.description: Retrieves each Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of schemas in the development state.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listDirectories
tools.description: Lists directories created within an account.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listFacetAttributes
tools.description: Retrieves attributes attached to the facet.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listFacetNames
tools.description: Retrieves the names of facets that exist in a schema.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listIncomingTypedLinks
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of all the incoming TypedLinkSpecifier information for an object. It also supports filtering by typed link facet and identity attributes. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listIndex
tools.description: Lists objects attached to the specified index.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listObjectAttributes
tools.description: Lists all attributes that are associated with an object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listObjectChildren
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of child objects that are associated with a given object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listObjectParentPaths
tools.description:
Retrieves all available parent paths for any object type such as node, leaf node, policy node, and index node objects. For more information about objects, see Directory Structure.

Use this API to evaluate all parents for an object. The call returns all objects from the root of the directory up to the requested object. The API returns the number of paths based on user-defined MaxResults, in case there are multiple paths to the parent. The order of the paths and nodes returned is consistent among multiple API calls unless the objects are deleted or moved. Paths not leading to the directory root are ignored from the target object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listObjectParents
tools.description: Lists parent objects that are associated with a given object in pagination fashion.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listObjectPolicies
tools.description: Returns policies attached to an object in pagination fashion.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listOutgoingTypedLinks
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of all the outgoing TypedLinkSpecifier information for an object. It also supports filtering by typed link facet and identity attributes. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listPolicyAttachments
tools.description: Returns all of the ObjectIdentifiers to which a given policy is attached.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listPublishedSchemaArns
tools.description: Lists the major version families of each published schema. If a major version ARN is provided as SchemaArn, the minor version revisions in that family are listed instead.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns tags for a resource. Tagging is currently supported only for directories with a limit of 50 tags per directory. All 50 tags are returned for a given directory with this API call.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listTypedLinkFacetAttributes
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of all attribute definitions for a particular TypedLinkFacet. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.listTypedLinkFacetNames
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of TypedLink facet names for a particular schema. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.lookupPolicy
tools.description: Lists all policies from the root of the Directory to the object specified. If there are no policies present, an empty list is returned. If policies are present, and if some objects don't have the policies attached, it returns the ObjectIdentifier for such objects. If policies are present, it returns ObjectIdentifier, policyId, and policyType. Paths that don't lead to the root from the target object are ignored. For more information, see Policies.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.publishSchema
tools.description: Publishes a development schema with a major version and a recommended minor version.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.putSchemaFromJson
tools.description: Allows a schema to be updated using JSON upload. Only available for development schemas. See JSON Schema Format for more information.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.removeFacetFromObject
tools.description: Removes the specified facet from the specified object.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.tagResource
tools.description: An API operation for adding tags to a resource.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.untagResource
tools.description: An API operation for removing tags from a resource.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.updateFacet
tools.description:
Does the following:

  1. Adds new Attributes, Rules, or ObjectTypes.

  2. Updates existing Attributes, Rules, or ObjectTypes.

  3. Deletes existing Attributes, Rules, or ObjectTypes.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.updateLinkAttributes
tools.description: Updates a given typed link’s attributes. Attributes to be updated must not contribute to the typed link’s identity, as defined by its IdentityAttributeOrder.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.updateObjectAttributes
tools.description: Updates a given object's attributes.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.updateSchema
tools.description: Updates the schema name with a new name. Only development schema names can be updated.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.updateTypedLinkFacet
tools.description: Updates a TypedLinkFacet. For more information, see Typed link.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.upgradeAppliedSchema
tools.description: Upgrades a single directory in-place using the PublishedSchemaArn with schema updates found in MinorVersion. Backwards-compatible minor version upgrades are instantaneously available for readers on all objects in the directory. Note: This is a synchronous API call and upgrades only one schema on a given directory per call. To upgrade multiple directories from one schema, you would need to call this API on each directory.

tools.name: amazonclouddirectory.upgradePublishedSchema
tools.description: Upgrades a published schema under a new minor version revision using the current contents of DevelopmentSchemaArn.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
